messages.text: Hey team, just finished implementing the dark mode toggle in the settings panel. It's working locally but needs testing on different screen sizes.
Great work! I'll help test it on mobile browsers. Also, did you update the CSS variables for the color scheme?
Yeah, I updated the CSS variables in :root. Using OKLCH colors as per our design system. Made sure to test contrast ratios too.
Just tested on iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Looks good! One minor issue - the toggle switch isn't animating smoothly on older devices.
Thanks for the feedback. I'll look into optimizing the animation for performance. Might need to use will-change or reduce the animation complexity.
